method: ADR 0009 D5 — record the Linux CI baseline FIRST; ceilings are baseline p95 plus fixed headroom, set once per roadmap cycle, never ratcheted per item. Scenarios without maxP95Ms are in RECORDING mode: the bench reports them and cannot fail on them.

runner.measurement: fresh child processes; wall time of the complete spawn (node startup + TypeScript load + validate)

hookWarm.rationale: The per-keystroke interactive path (PreToolUse hook with a warm scan cache). Ceiling lands after the first Linux baseline is recorded by CI.

hookCold.rationale: First write after a cache flush. Ceiling lands after the Linux baseline.

doctorCold.rationale: Cold one-shot doctor over the tree. Ceiling lands after the Linux baseline.
